Bash("c:\\Users\\bwerb\\Documents\\GitHub\\LOCNESS\\Animation\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv\(r''c:\\Users\\bwerb\\Documents\\GitHub\\LOCNESS\\Animation\\data\\LocnessMapProduct_08252025.txt''\)
for platform in df[''Platform''].unique\(\):
    sub = df[\(df[''Platform'']==platform\) & \(df[''lat'']>1\) & \(df[''lon'']<-1\)].dropna\(subset=[''unixTimestamp'',''lat'',''lon'']\)
    cruises = sub[''Cruise''].unique\(\)
    layers = sub[''Layer''].unique\(\)
    import datetime
    if len\(sub\) > 0:
        t0 = datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp\(sub[''unixTimestamp''].min\(\), tz=datetime.timezone.utc\)
        t1 = datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp\(sub[''unixTimestamp''].max\(\), tz=datetime.timezone.utc\)
        print\(f''{platform}: {len\(sub\)} pts, cruises={list\(cruises\)}, layers={list\(layers\)}, {t0:%m/%d} -> {t1:%m/%d}''\)
    else:
        print\(f''{platform}: no valid points''\)
")

Bash("c:\\Users\\bwerb\\Documents\\GitHub\\LOCNESS\\Animation\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv\(r''c:\\Users\\bwerb\\Documents\\GitHub\\LOCNESS\\Animation\\data\\LocnessMapProduct_08252025.txt''\)
df = df[\(df[''lat'']>1\) & \(df[''lon'']<-1\)].dropna\(subset=[''unixTimestamp'',''lat'',''lon'']\)
drifters = df[df[''Platform'']==''Drifter'']
for c in drifters[''Cruise''].unique\(\):
    track = drifters[drifters[''Cruise'']==c].drop_duplicates\(subset=[''unixTimestamp'']\).sort_values\(''unixTimestamp''\)
    if len\(track\) > 1:
        print\(f''{c}: {len\(track\)} pts''\)
")
